mapper.select: SELECT scale_id, name, version, disorder_type, description FROM scale WHERE scale_id = #{scaleId}
SELECT item_id, stem, dimension, sort_order, max_score FROM scale_item WHERE scale_id = #{scaleId} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT lower_bound, upper_bound, label, interpretation FROM score_band WHERE scale_id = #{scaleId}
SELECT scale_id, name, version, disorder_type, description FROM scale ORDER BY scale_id
SELECT scale_id, name, version, disorder_type, description FROM scale WHERE disorder_type = #{disorderType} ORDER BY scale_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scale (scale_id, name, version, disorder_type, description) VALUES (#{scaleId}, #{name}, #{version}, #{disorderType}, #{description})
INSERT INTO scale_item (scale_id, item_id, stem, dimension, sort_order, max_score) VALUES (#{scaleId}, #{itemId}, #{stem}, #{dimension}, #{sortOrder}, #{maxScore})
INSERT INTO score_band (scale_id, lower_bound, upper_bound, label, interpretation) VALUES (#{scaleId}, #{lowerBound}, #{upperBound}, #{label}, #{interpretation})
